SSH transport security check rejects connection before tunnel is established
security audit: two false positives for single-operator multi-agent setups

Proposal: Add security warning for untrusted skills loaded from local sources

[Feature]: Security: fetch-auth bearer token fallback attaches tokens to arbitrary URLs without fail-closed defaults
[Bug]: Security prompt is too long to approve, and clicking "Allow All" on the security prompt is ineffective

webchat: system event completion messages visible to user and styled as user messages

[Feature] Add denylist mode to exec.security for balanced security
Security: exec tool returns raw stdout/stderr to agent without secret redaction

openclaw security audit --deep hangs during diagnostics on 2026.5.12
feat(anthropic): enforce --safe-mode on all claude-cli subprocess launches

fix: honor configured default model for embedded agents

fix: dedupe codex commentary across event lanes
fix: avoid parent group allowlist false positive

fix(telegram): use native rich drafts for live previews
fix(agents): honor embedded run default model
fix(ui): preserve WebChat wheel scroll intent
#93381: Expose tool_use blocks in llm_output / agent_end hook payloads

feat: add Codex hosted web search
feat(tts): add word-level timestamps to TTS synthesis
fix(feishu): dedupe redelivered text by stable retry identity
feat(telegram): accept structured spec in rich message (heading/table/list/details)
#93436: Forward run context to the model as opt-in request headers
fix(bedrock): strip inference profile prefix from model ID in embedding adapter
[Bug]: feishu channel: failed to dispatch message — TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'run')
fix(sqlite): disable WAL on network filesystems
fix(cli): accept --log-level after subcommands
[Bug]: Route-first commands accept --log-level but do not apply it
